title: Add Mission Control evaluation visibility surfaces
summary: Implemented eval visibility in task modal, agent modal, and lead console by wiring latest eval signals into UI and adding manual evaluation run control from task view.
changes: Added Evaluation tab to task modal and history display based on /api/evals/task/:task_id.
Added task-level manual eval trigger via /api/evals/run.
Extended lead queue payload with latest eval status/score/fault data.
Rendered eval badges and signals in lead console cards.
risks: Evaluation tab refresh currently on-demand; no live SSE for eval rows yet.
Agent performance tab is read-only in this slice; no threshold tuning controls yet.
rollback: Remove Evaluation tab and Agent performance tab UI wiring; keep backend eval APIs intact.
